zh-tw.title: 旅遊語錄
zh-tw.description: 從出國前的失眠、機場凌晨的低聲咒罵，到回家以後第一碗泡麵——精選旅行金句、廢話文學、國旅心情語錄，給每一個還在背包裡找護照的你

en.title: Travel Quotes
en.description: Wanderlust lines, airport sighs, and luggage truths — short travel quotes for the people who packed too much, slept too little, and somehow loved every minute of it

items.sourceNote: 經典 wanderlust register，重新組合改寫

zh-tw.content:
旅行不是逃離生活，
是給生活一個機會，
讓你重新愛上它。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放在旅遊照 IG caption、年末回顧文、辭職告別信開頭——比「世界這麼大我想去看看」 更不口號、更有溫度
variations: 旅行不是逃避，是讓你回來時，重新願意打開家門那一刻的儀式。

en.content:
Travel isn't running away from your life.
It's giving your life a reason to want you back.
en.editorNote: Works as an Instagram caption, a year-end reflection post, or a goodbye line in a goodbye-for-now letter to friends
variations: Travel isn't an escape — it's the long way back to the version of yourself you forgot you liked.

items.sourceNote: 經典 luggage / emotional baggage 雙關，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我去旅行不是要放下行李，
是要把行李帶到比較有海景的地方繼續放著。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在朋友問「你旅遊都在幹嘛」時回的廢話金句，比「轉換心情」之類的官腔好笑很多
variations: 我以為旅行會讓我放下情緒包袱，後來發現只是搬到別的飯店繼續打開來檢查。

en.content:
I didn't go on this trip to leave my baggage behind.
I just wanted to unpack it somewhere with a better view.
en.editorNote: A self-aware caption for the kind of trip that's clearly therapy-with-a-passport — works on solo travel posts, divorce trips, or any 'main character era' moment
variations: Therapy is expensive. Plane tickets are expensive. But at least the plane ticket comes with a window seat.

items.sourceNote: 2026 國旅補助 timely register，原創 frame

zh-tw.content:
國旅補助讓我搞清楚一件事：
我不是不想出門，
我是不想用原價出門。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 國旅補助 4–6月主場期最在地的廢文 register；適合 LINE 群組丟給準備搶券的朋友、IG 自嘲文、Threads 短發
variations: 今年的旅行不是衝動，是補助到期前的責任感。
我不是節儉，我是用 1200 塊住宿券的方式宣示我還活著。

en.content:
I'm not cheap.
I just refuse to travel without a discount code, a coupon, and three layers of strategic timing.
en.editorNote: Universal voice for budget travelers — works on Reddit r/travel posts, deal-hunting blog intros, and any caption where the receipts are part of the joke
variations: I don't choose destinations. The flight deals choose me.

items.sourceNote: 廢話文學 register × travel，原創

zh-tw.content:
在飛機上，
每飛一分鐘，
就離家更遠一分鐘。
zh-tw.editorNote: 標準廢話文學 frame——適合在朋友傳機場照分享時回一句，或自己出國登機前發一則 IG 限動，自帶笑點
variations: 搭飛機最大的好處，是讓你抵達一個你還沒抵達的地方。

en.content:
Every minute on a plane
is one minute closer to where you're going,
and one minute further from where you were.

Wild.
en.editorNote: Deadpan absurdist humor — pairs well with a window-seat photo or a caption on any flight you'd rather not be taking
variations: The thing about airplanes is that they take you somewhere. That's actually their whole deal.

items.sourceNote: I followed my heart frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我聽從我的內心，
結果它把我帶到了桃園機場第二航廈，
出境大廳，凌晨四點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 凌晨機場 specific moment 是 LINE / Threads / IG 限動最有畫面感的 frame——適合搭配機場照、登機證、或失眠紅眼班機自拍
variations: 我跟著直覺走，直覺把我帶到行李超重 800 塊台幣的櫃台。

en.content:
I followed my heart
and somehow ended up at gate 47
at 4:30 in the morning,
eating the worst sandwich of my life.
en.editorNote: Captions for that 4 AM airport energy — pair with a tired-but-happy selfie or a photo of a depressing airport breakfast
variations: I followed my heart. It led to the airport. My heart is just a flight deal alert.

items.sourceNote: richer-by-spending 經典 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
錢包變薄的速度，
剛好等於你回憶變厚的速度。

這就是旅行最公平的匯率。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放年末旅行總結文、消費後合理化貼文、跟長輩解釋為什麼又出國的金句——溫柔但夠堅定
variations: 旅行是唯一一種你花完錢，還會覺得自己更富有的消費。

en.content:
The money leaves your account.
The memory takes its place.

That's the exchange rate of every good trip.
en.editorNote: Works as a comeback for anyone who calls travel 'wasteful' — gentle but firm. Good for travel blog intros and reflective IG captions
variations: Money runs out. Memories don't. Spend accordingly.

items.sourceNote: solo travel register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
一個人的旅行最孤獨的不是路上，
是回來以後
發現沒有人聽得懂
你為了一道湯走了三條街的興奮。
zh-tw.editorNote: 獨旅後 IG 長 caption / Threads 抒發 / 部落格開頭都好用——獨旅族最痛的點不是寂寞而是回來無人共享，這句一刀切中
variations: 一個人的旅行最大的禮物，是學會跟自己約會、跟自己吵架、跟自己和解，全部一個下午搞定。

en.content:
Solo travel isn't lonely on the road.
It's lonely when you come home
and nobody else gets why
the bowl of soup mattered.
en.editorNote: Solo travel reflection caption — captures the post-trip ache that solo travelers know but rarely articulate
variations: Solo travel taught me that the loneliest part isn't the trip. It's explaining the trip to people who weren't there.

items.sourceNote: Dcard 出國行李清單 register，原創廢文

zh-tw.content:
出國前一晚的失眠，
不是焦慮，
是身體比你早一步
進入下一個時區。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合凌晨打包到一半的 IG 限動、紅眼班機自拍、Threads 短發——把人人都有的「出發前睡不著」 重新詮釋成浪漫的事
variations: 凌晨三點還在數行李件數的我，已經提前抵達目的地的失眠，只剩身體沒跟上。

en.content:
The night before a trip
you don't sleep
because your body has already left.
It's just waiting for you to catch up.
en.editorNote: Reframes pre-trip insomnia as something poetic instead of stressful — works for a 3 AM packing photo or a red-eye flight caption
variations: I haven't slept in 22 hours and I haven't even left my apartment. This is what excitement looks like at 34.

items.sourceNote: 出國行李清單 anxiety register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我帶的不是行李，
是「萬一」的清單：
萬一冷、萬一熱、萬一下雨、
萬一我的人生在飯店突然需要一條牙線。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李炸開的 IG 照、跟朋友互嘲打包習慣、出國前 Threads 自嘲——精準描述 Dcard 行李清單派 vs 隨興派的痛
variations: 我整理行李不是在打包，是在預演 28 種可能的我。

en.content:
I'm not packing a suitcase.
I'm packing every version of myself
that might possibly need to exist
for the next ten days.
en.editorNote: For the chronic over-packer — captures the truth that packing anxiety is really identity anxiety in a smaller container
variations: I packed for the weather, the mood, the meeting I won't have, and the version of me who finally journals every morning.

items.sourceNote: 「找回自己」 register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
旅行不是去看世界，
是去看世界裡，
那個你本來就該長成的樣子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合 30 歲生日旅行文、辭職環島、Gap Year 心得開頭——比「找自己」 更具體、不矯情
variations: 我不是出門找風景，我是去確認那個我喜歡過的自己還在不在。

en.content:
You don't travel to see the world.
You travel to find the version of yourself
the world has been waiting for.
en.editorNote: Birthday trip captions, gap year intros, post-resignation soul-search posts — sincere without being saccharine
variations: I'm not chasing the view. I'm chasing the version of me who only shows up at altitude.

items.sourceNote: 「I haven't been everywhere」 經典 frame，改寫

zh-tw.content:
我還沒去過所有地方，
但是我有清單，
清單比我還長壽。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放護照本內頁、行李吊牌、IG bio——自帶幽默又勵志，比「夢想清單」 更輕快
variations: 我的待辦清單越長，代表我活得越認真。

en.content:
I haven't been everywhere yet.
But I have the list.
The list will outlive me, honestly.
en.editorNote: Bio-line energy. Works on a passport cover, a luggage tag, or as the closing line of a 'places I want to visit' post
variations: I haven't been everywhere. But I'm working on it. Slowly. Expensively. Joyfully.

items.sourceNote: airplane / wing 經典雙關，改寫

zh-tw.content:
問：搭飛機的時候我都在幹嘛？

答：在祈禱。
還有，看別人也在祈禱。
zh-tw.editorNote: 怕飛族專屬廢文——適合搭配登機自拍、機艙窗戶照，告訴朋友「我這趟回不來請記得餵我家的貓」 的幽默版本
variations: 搭飛機最高深的禪修：把命交給駕駛艙、把胃交給亂流、把希望交給空姐推餐車。

en.content:
What do I do on planes?

I pray.
And I watch other people pray.

It's a community.
en.editorNote: For nervous flyers — pairs with a window selfie or a 'if I don't come back, feed my cat' joke caption
variations: Flying is just trusting strangers in really specific outfits with your entire life. We're all very brave.

items.sourceNote: Taiwan Pass / 國旅 2026 timely register，原創

zh-tw.content:
台灣很小，
但小到剛好可以
讓你週五下班、
週日晚上回到自己床上，
中間還塞得進一座海。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 Taiwan Pass / 國旅補助 主場期最 timely 的在地旅行金句——適合花蓮、台東、墾丁、宜蘭出遊文，IG / Threads / LINE 三平台通用
variations: 在台灣，最遠的距離不是雙北到屏東，是星期五的你到星期一的你。

en.content:
Taiwan is small enough
to leave on Friday after work,
be at the ocean by sunset,
and still sleep in your own bed Sunday night.

That's not small. That's perfect.
en.editorNote: For international readers / overseas Taiwanese — captures why weekend trips in Taiwan hit different. Use on travel blog posts about Taiwan or expat-life captions
variations: Taiwan: the only country small enough to fit a beach, a mountain, and a regret in a single weekend.

items.sourceNote: jet lag IG caption register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
時差不是病，
是你的身體還愛著前一個城市，
捨不得跟你回來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合回國第一天頂著黑眼圈上班的 IG 限動、Threads 自嘲，或回國後第三天還在凌晨四點清醒滑手機的 caption——把時差講得很浪漫
variations: 我不是時差，我是身體比靈魂晚三天到家。

en.content:
Jet lag isn't an illness.
It's your body still in love with the last city,
refusing to come home with you.
en.editorNote: Captions for the post-trip haze — works on the under-eye-circles selfie, the 4 AM scroll, or the first-day-back-at-work zombie photo
variations: I don't have jet lag. My body is just three days behind my soul, and we're both fine with it.

items.sourceNote: Google Maps / 迷路 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我沒有迷路，
我只是讓 Google Maps 帶我認識
它私心想推薦的小巷。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在巷弄迷路時拍的廢照搭配的 caption，或事後跟朋友解釋為什麼遲到一小時的金句——把焦慮變成風格
variations: 迷路不是錯誤，是 Google Maps 的隱藏行程。

en.content:
I'm not lost.
I'm just letting Google Maps show me
the alleys it personally recommends.
en.editorNote: Captions for the inevitable wrong-turn photos — reframes getting lost as a feature, not a bug. Pairs with cobblestone streets, dead-end alleys, or that one time you walked 40 minutes the wrong way
variations: Getting lost isn't a mistake. It's the unsponsored part of the trip.

items.sourceNote: out of office / vacation register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我的自動回覆寫著「休假中」，
但其實我是在練習一個更難的技能：
不打開公司信箱。
zh-tw.editorNote: 辦公室人最有共鳴的休假廢文——適合年假出國的 IG caption、Threads 短發、跟同事炫耀休假的 LINE 訊息
variations: 我不是在度假，我是在訓練自己對未讀訊息冷感。

en.content:
My out-of-office reply says I'm on vacation,
but what I'm really doing
is practicing the much harder skill
of not opening Slack.
en.editorNote: For the burned-out office traveler — captures the real challenge of vacation in 2026. Works on resort photos, beach selfies, or any 'I swear I'm relaxing' moment
variations: Vacation is just learning, slowly, painfully, that the world keeps spinning without your reply-all.

items.sourceNote: 回家 / homecoming register，原創

zh-tw.content:
旅行最棒的部分是出發，
第二棒的部分是抵達，
但最被低估的，
是打開家門那一刻
聞到的那股熟悉的味道。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合旅行回國後第一篇 IG 文、Threads 短發、年末回顧——把「回家」 寫得比目的地還動人
variations: 走過那麼多地方，最後發現家裡的味道才是這趟旅行最捨不得忘的東西。

en.content:
The best part of travel is leaving.
The second best is arriving.
The most underrated part
is opening your front door
and smelling your own life again.
en.editorNote: For the post-trip homecoming post — captures the quiet joy of returning that nobody puts on a moodboard. Works on 'unpacking' photos, first-coffee-back-home shots, or year-end travel reflections
variations: After everywhere, the best smell in the world turned out to be the inside of my own apartment.

items.sourceNote: hotel check-in / suite life register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
飯店 check-in 的那一刻，
我才終於明白
所謂的 reset，
是一條乾淨的浴巾、
一張別人鋪好的床、
還有不用我擦的浴室鏡子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合飯店窗景照、走廊自拍、puffy 床鋪平拍——把「住飯店」這件事的療癒感說到位，比「逃離日常」更具體
variations: 我不是在度假，我是在租用一個沒有家事責任的人生。
飯店房卡是地表上最便宜的「重新做人」工具。

en.content:
The moment you check into a hotel,
you understand:
a 'reset' is just a clean towel,
a bed someone else made,
and a bathroom mirror you didn't have to wipe.
en.editorNote: For the hotel-room flat lay, the floor-to-ceiling-window selfie, or the freshly-made-bed shot. Captures why hotels feel like therapy
variations: I'm not on vacation. I'm renting a version of my life where I don't do laundry.
A hotel keycard is the cheapest reset button on earth.

items.sourceNote: 紀念品 / souvenir register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我帶回來的那塊冰箱磁鐵，
貴得不合理，
醜得有特色，
但它每天提醒我：
那一週我活得比現在快樂一點。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合廚房冰箱特寫、紀念品開箱、回國整理戰利品的 IG 限動——把「買沒用的東西」 升格為情感投資
variations: 紀念品從來不是給別人看的，是給未來那個忘記怎麼快樂的自己留的線索。

en.content:
The fridge magnet I brought back
is overpriced,
slightly ugly,
and the only thing reminding me
that I was, briefly, a happier person.
en.editorNote: For the cluttered-fridge close-up or the souvenir haul photo — turns the cheap kitsch you regret buying into something quietly meaningful
variations: Souvenirs aren't for other people. They're notes you leave for the future version of you who forgot how to be happy.

items.sourceNote: food tourism / 美食旅行 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我不是去旅行，
我是去用我的胃
親自驗證
別人 Google Maps 上四點七顆星
是不是真的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 美食控旅行專屬 caption——適合排隊兩小時的店門口照、剛上桌的食物特寫、Threads 食記開頭，比「為食而活」更有畫面感
variations: 我整趟行程沒看景點，只看餐廳的營業時間。
別人收集明信片，我收集胃食道逆流的回憶。

en.content:
I don't travel.
I personally verify, with my own stomach,
whether someone's 4.7-star review
on Google Maps
is telling the truth.
en.editorNote: For the food-traveler — pairs with the steaming bowl close-up, the two-hour-line selfie, or the 'restaurants only' itinerary post
variations: Other people collect postcards. I collect the heartburn of three different countries.
My itinerary isn't a list of cities. It's a list of restaurant opening hours.

items.sourceNote: trip end / suitcase reopened register，原創

zh-tw.content:
回國一週了，
我的行李箱還沒拆完。

這不是懶，
是我還沒準備好
承認旅行已經結束。
zh-tw.editorNote: 回國一週後的 Threads 自嘲、IG 限動廢文金句——精準描述旅人最尷尬的拖延症，把懶惰浪漫化
variations: 行李箱沒拆完，是我給自己留的最後一張機票存根。

en.content:
It's been a week.
My suitcase is still half-unpacked.

That's not laziness.
I'm just not ready
to admit the trip is over.
en.editorNote: For the suitcase-still-on-the-floor photo — captures the universal traveler's procrastination as a tiny act of denial. Works on Threads, IG captions, blog post intros
variations: An unpacked suitcase is the last boarding pass you get to hold onto.

items.sourceNote: airport 6 AM burger / passport-in-hand register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
機場是一個神奇的地方：
早上六點吃漢堡不會有人覺得奇怪，
你也可以一邊翻包包找護照，
一邊忘記護照正握在你手上。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合凌晨機場自拍、登機證平拍、Threads 出國前廢發——把機場那種「時空錯亂」的荒謬感寫進去，誰看了都點頭
variations: 機場唯一的時區規則是：你的胃跟你的焦慮，永遠比起飛時間早三小時。
機場是少數幾個你可以對著一杯三百塊的拿鐵流眼淚，還沒人問你為什麼的地方。

en.content:
An airport is a magical place
where a 6 AM burger is normal,
and you can rip your bag apart
looking for the passport
you're already holding.
en.editorNote: For the bleary-eyed boarding-gate selfie or the chaos-bag flat lay — captures airport energy in a way every traveler has lived through at least once
variations: Airports are the only place where crying into a $9 latte feels like a perfectly reasonable Tuesday.
At the airport, your stomach and your anxiety are always three hours ahead of the actual flight.

items.sourceNote: lost luggage / surprise minimalist register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
行李寄丟那一刻，
航空公司沒告訴我，
但他們其實送了我一份大禮：
為期七天的強制極簡生活體驗。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李轉盤前的尷尬自拍、機場詢問櫃台前的 Threads 廢發、回國後跟朋友抱怨用——把災難轉成段子，比直接哭哭好看一百倍
variations: 我不是被迫穿同一件衣服七天，我是在執行一個無預警的時尚挑戰。
行李寄丟最大的收穫，是發現我其實只需要三件 T 恤就能活下去（雖然不情願）。

en.content:
When the airline lost my luggage,
they didn't say it out loud,
but they basically gifted me
a seven-day mandatory minimalism retreat.
en.editorNote: For the empty-baggage-carousel photo, the same-outfit-day-three selfie, or the post-trip complaint thread — turns a mini-disaster into a punchline
variations: I'm not wearing the same shirt three days in a row. I'm participating in an unscheduled capsule wardrobe experiment.
Lost luggage taught me I can survive on three t-shirts. Reluctantly. Resentfully. But yes.

items.sourceNote: 「travel expands your luggage」雙關 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
他們說旅行會開拓你的視野。

以我個人的經驗，
它主要開拓的是我的行李箱、
我的信用卡額度、
還有我對自己決策能力的懷疑。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合戰利品開箱、信用卡帳單來的那天的 IG 限動、Threads 自嘲文——把旅行最常被講的「開拓視野」 翻轉成最現實的版本
variations: 旅行不會讓我變成更好的人，但會讓我變成行李箱更滿的人。
出國回來唯一變寬的不是視野，是我的腰圍跟手機相簿。

en.content:
They say travel broadens the mind.

In my experience
it mainly broadens my suitcase,
my credit card limit,
and my deep distrust of my own decisions.
en.editorNote: Pairs with souvenir hauls, statement-day IG stories, or the post-trip 'why did I buy this' thread — flips the wanderlust cliché into something honest
variations: Travel doesn't make me a better person. It just makes me a person with a much fuller suitcase.
The only thing that got broader on this trip was my waistband and my camera roll.

items.sourceNote: photo vs. reality / 預期 vs 真實 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
IG 上看起來：日落、海景、自由的靈魂。
實際上：腳被沙子磨破皮、頭髮黏成一團、
我只是在等老闆已讀我兩小時前的請假訊息。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合「IG 美照 vs 真實狀態」 對比文、Threads 廢發、回國後爆料文——把社群上的旅行濾鏡撕掉一層，自帶笑點跟真誠
variations: 美照背後通常有三十張失敗、一隻被偷吃薯條的海鷗、跟我快斷掉的耐心。
你以為我在感受人生，其實我在等飯店 Wi-Fi 重新連上。

en.content:
What it looks like on Instagram:
sunset, ocean, free spirit.

What it actually is:
sand in my shoes, hair glued to my face,
and me waiting for my boss
to read the leave request I sent two hours ago.
en.editorNote: For the photo-vs-reality dump, the candid follow-up to a glossy sunset shot, or the honest IG carousel — peels back the travel filter without being cynical
variations: Behind every dreamy beach photo is thirty failed shots, one fry-stealing seagull, and a slowly fraying patience.
You think I'm soaking in life. I'm actually just waiting for the hotel Wi-Fi to reconnect.

items.sourceNote: road trip / 開車旅行 register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
公路旅行最浪漫的部分，
不是窗外的風景，
是車上那個願意陪你
聽同一首歌循環二十七次
還沒翻臉的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合公路旅行 IG caption、副駕自拍、Threads 抒情短發——把「找風景」 轉成「找伴」，比一般景點打卡更有故事感
variations: 車程五小時，我們吵了三次架、和好兩次，剩下那一次留給回程慢慢消化。
公路旅行教我的事：油表跟感情一樣，都要在還剩三分之一的時候提前處理。

en.content:
The best part of a road trip
isn't the view out the window.
It's the person in the passenger seat
who lets you replay the same song
twenty-seven times
without filing for divorce.
en.editorNote: For the open-road photo, the dashboard-and-coffee shot, or the dusty-windshield selfie — reframes road trips as relationship stress-tests in the best way
variations: Five hours in the car. Three fights. Two apologies. One unresolved tension we're saving for the drive home.
Road trips taught me: gas tanks and feelings both need refilling before they hit empty.

items.sourceNote: overpacking 經典 register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我每次出國都告訴自己：
這次絕對輕便出門。

然後我打包了
五雙鞋、
三本沒時間看的書、
還有一個熨斗。

為什麼帶熨斗，
至今是個謎。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李炸開的平拍、出國前夜 IG 限動、Threads 自嘲——把每個人都犯過的「打包失控」 寫成輕喜劇
variations: 我說好的輕便旅行，最後變成把整個衣櫃搬到 23 公斤以內的競技。
行李箱裝得下我的不安全感，但裝不下我自己。

en.content:
Every trip I promise myself:
this time I'll pack light.

Then I bring
five pairs of shoes,
three books I won't open,
and an iron.

Why the iron.
Nobody knows.
en.editorNote: For the chaos-suitcase flat lay, the night-before-trip story, or the airport check-in queue selfie — the universal overpacker confession
variations: I said 'pack light.' I packed every insecurity I own and then some, neatly folded.
My suitcase has room for my anxiety, but not for me.

items.sourceNote: 兌幣 / 匯率 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
出國前換錢那一刻，
我才終於懂了
什麼叫做
「數字看起來很多，
花起來像在燒衛生紙」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合銀行 ATM 自拍、外幣信封照、剛回國盤點剩錢的 Threads 廢發——把匯率焦慮寫得很有畫面
variations: 換到一疊鈔票的瞬間我是富翁，付完第一頓飯我就變回打工仔。
我的旅費換完之後變成另一種語言，連數錯都很有國際感。

en.content:
Exchanging money before a trip
is the moment you finally understand
what 'numerically rich,
practically broke'
actually means.
en.editorNote: Works on the bank-counter selfie, the fan-of-foreign-bills photo, or the post-trip 'how did I spend it all' Threads post — captures the surreal math of currency exchange
variations: I felt rich for exactly four seconds — from the ATM to the first meal.
My travel budget gets translated into a new language at the exchange counter. Even miscounting it feels worldly.

items.sourceNote: travel companion / 旅伴 friction register，原創

zh-tw.content:
想知道一個人真正的個性，
別跟他聊夢想、
別跟他喝酒，
直接約他去自由行七天，
第三天早上的早餐桌上見真章。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合跟朋友的旅伴合照、Threads 旅行心得短發、IG 出遊回顧——把旅伴文化講得很到位，自帶笑點又真實
variations: 旅行最考驗的不是體力，是你能不能在第五天還願意跟同行的人講話。
好的旅伴比好的景點難找太多，找到了請記得珍惜，找不到請學會獨旅。

en.content:
You want to know someone's real personality?
Don't ask about their dreams.
Don't get drinks.
Go on a seven-day trip with them
and check in over breakfast on day three.
en.editorNote: For the travel-buddy duo shot, the awkward-restaurant-table photo, or the Threads post about surviving group travel — captures the universal truth that trips are friendship pressure tests
variations: Travel doesn't test your stamina. It tests whether you're still willing to talk to your friend on day five.
Good travel partners are rarer than good destinations. Find one, keep one. Otherwise, solo trip it is.

items.sourceNote: 「punching people frowned upon」 經典 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我之所以一直出國，
是因為在公司
對著主管翻白眼
會被寫進考績。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合年假爆發出國的 IG caption、Threads 抱怨文、跟同事炫耀請假的 LINE 訊息——把上班族出國的真正動機講得很白
variations: 出國不是因為熱愛冒險，是因為待在原地會出事。
我的旅行頻率，跟我老闆的脾氣成正比。

en.content:
I travel a lot
because rolling my eyes at my boss
is technically grounds
for a performance review.
en.editorNote: For the airport-after-a-rough-week selfie or the 'using all my PTO' Threads post — captures why office workers really need vacation
variations: I'm not adventurous. I just can't afford the consequences of staying put.
My travel frequency is directly proportional to my manager's mood.

items.sourceNote: tripophobia / 沒行程焦慮 register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
現代人有一種新的焦慮，
叫做「沒有下一張機票」症候群。

症狀包括：
半夜滑廉航網站、
莫名其妙加購行李額度、
以及對著護照頁數發呆。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合廉航搶票截圖、護照特寫、Threads 半夜衝動買票後的反省文——把旅人最隱秘的焦慮命名出來，誰看了都中槍
variations: 我不是想出國，我是受不了行事曆上一片空白。
沒下一趟旅行的人生，像手機只剩 3% 電還找不到充電線。

en.content:
There's a new modern anxiety
called 'no-next-flight syndrome.'

Symptoms include:
browsing budget airlines at 2 AM,
mysteriously upgrading luggage allowance,
and staring at empty passport pages.
en.editorNote: For the late-night flight-search screenshot, the passport flat lay, or the Threads confession after an impulse booking — names the quiet panic of having no trip on the calendar
variations: I'm not addicted to travel. I'm allergic to an empty calendar.
Life without a next trip feels like a phone at 3% with no charger in sight.

items.sourceNote: 「buy plane tickets = buy happiness」 經典 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
錢買不到快樂，
但可以買機票。

機票買不到快樂，
但可以把你送到一個
暫時忘記煩惱的地方。

這個邏輯，會計師可能不懂。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合刷卡買機票後的 IG 限動、Threads 自我合理化長文、跟家人解釋為什麼又花錢出國的金句——比原版多一層真實感
variations: 我不是把錢花光了，我是把錢換成了未來三個月可以回味的回憶。
信用卡帳單是會過去的，但那場日落不會。

en.content:
Money can't buy happiness.
But it can buy plane tickets.

Plane tickets can't buy happiness either.
But they can drop you off
somewhere your problems can't reach you for a while.

My accountant doesn't approve.
en.editorNote: For the post-booking screenshot, the boarding-pass photo, or the 'explaining-it-to-my-parents' Threads post — adds one extra honest layer to the classic line
variations: I didn't blow my savings. I converted them into three months of memories I'll keep replaying.
Credit card statements fade. That sunset doesn't.

items.sourceNote: 「離開舒適圈」 register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
舒適圈不是一個地方，
是一種習慣。

所以離開它
不一定要飛到歐洲，
有時候只是
搭一班沒坐過的公車
到沒下過的那一站。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合通勤路線小冒險的 Threads 短發、在地小旅行 IG caption、辭職後第一篇文——把「離開舒適圈」 重新詮釋得更日常、更不勵志雞湯
variations: 成長不需要護照，有時候只需要一張悠遊卡跟一點點不知道接下來會怎樣的勇氣。
舒適圈的邊界不在地圖上，在你願不願意按下車鈴的那一秒。

en.content:
The comfort zone isn't a place.
It's a habit.

Leaving it
doesn't always mean flying to Europe.
Sometimes it just means
taking a bus you've never been on
to a stop you've never gotten off at.
en.editorNote: For the local-discovery Threads post, the post-resignation reflection, or any 'micro-adventure' caption — reframes growth as something quieter than the wanderlust cliché
variations: Growth doesn't require a passport. Sometimes it just needs a transit card and a little willingness not to know what happens next.
The edge of your comfort zone isn't on a map. It's the second before you press the stop-request button.

items.sourceNote: 「six months of vacation twice a year」經典 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我需要的假期長度，
大概是六個月，
一年兩次。

剩下的時間用來
回憶上一次度假
跟期待下一次度假。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合連假結束前一晚的 Threads 哀號、收假回辦公室第一天的 IG 限動、被主管追進度時的內心 OS——把上班族的真心話寫到極致
variations: 理想的工作年資是這樣分配的：上班三個月、休息三個月、再上班三個月、再休息三個月。
我不是不想工作，是希望工作可以排在我兩段旅行的中間做配菜就好。

en.content:
I need six months of vacation.
Twice a year.

The rest of the time
is for remembering the last trip
and planning the next one.
en.editorNote: For the Sunday-night-before-Monday Threads post or the back-to-office selfie — the universal anthem of every salaried traveler
variations: My ideal work schedule: three months on, three months off, three months on, three months off.
I don't hate working. I just want it to be the side dish between two main-course vacations.

items.sourceNote: 「lay out clothes and money, take half the clothes and twice the money」經典 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
打包旅行的黃金法則：
把所有衣服跟所有錢都攤開來，
衣服拿走一半，
錢帶走兩倍。

然後你會發現，
還是不夠用。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李打包到一半的 IG 限動、出國前換錢的 Threads 廢發、回國盤點戰利品的反省文——經典旅行智慧的台味升級版
variations: 打包經驗法則：衣服永遠帶太多、錢永遠帶太少、後悔的東西永遠忘記帶。
出國旅費的計算方式：你預估的金額 × 1.8，再加上一次衝動消費的緊急基金。

en.content:
The golden rule of packing:
lay out all your clothes and all your money,
take half the clothes
and twice the money.

You'll still run out.
en.editorNote: Caption for the mid-pack chaos shot, the currency-exchange counter selfie, or the post-trip 'where did it all go' Threads post — a classic rule with one extra honest twist
variations: Packing law: always too many clothes, never enough cash, and you'll forget the one thing you actually needed.
Travel budget formula: your estimate × 1.8, plus one emergency fund for impulse souvenirs.

items.sourceNote: 「pack 2 hours before, unpack 3 months after」 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
出國的人分兩種：
出發前兩小時才開始打包的，
跟回國三個月還沒拆完行李的。

沒錯，
他們是同一個人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李箱還躺在客廳角落的 IG 限動、出發前夜手忙腳亂的 Threads 短發——把旅人最矛盾的拖延症一刀切中
variations: 我的打包速度跟我的解包速度差三個月，這就是熱情的曲線。
出發前一夜是賽跑，回國後三個月是放空，中間那幾天才是我真正活著的時候。

en.content:
There are two kinds of travelers:
those who pack two hours before the flight,
and those who still haven't unpacked three months later.

They're the same person.
en.editorNote: For the still-on-the-floor suitcase photo, the night-before-trip chaos selfie, or any Threads post about traveler procrastination — captures the universal split personality
variations: My packing speed and unpacking speed are exactly three months apart. That's the shape of enthusiasm.
The night before a trip is a sprint. The three months after is a coma. The trip itself is the only time I'm fully awake.

items.sourceNote: 慢旅行 / slow travel register，原創

zh-tw.content:
最好的旅行
不是去最多地方，
而是在某一個小鎮的早餐店，
坐到老闆都記得你要的不加蛋。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合在地咖啡店特寫、早餐店木桌平拍、Threads 慢旅行心得短發——把「慢旅行」的精神寫得不矯情、有溫度
variations: 我不追景點，我追一條街、一家店、一個讓我願意明天再來的理由。
好的旅行不是地圖上打勾，是身體記得回家的那條巷子怎麼走。

en.content:
The best kind of trip
isn't seeing the most places.
It's sitting in a small-town breakfast spot
long enough
for the owner to remember
you don't take eggs.
en.editorNote: Captions for the local-cafe interior shot, the weathered breakfast-counter close-up, or the slow-travel Threads reflection — captures the soul of slow travel without the cliché
variations: I'm not chasing landmarks. I'm chasing a street, a shop, a reason to come back tomorrow.
A good trip isn't a list of checkmarks. It's your body learning the way back to a tiny alley you've only walked twice.

items.sourceNote: hotel breakfast buffet 經典 register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
飯店早餐自助吧是我這輩子
唯一願意早起的理由。

而且我吃的份量
是房價裡早就算好的，
不吃才叫吃虧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合自助吧戰利品平拍、滿到溢出的盤子特寫、Threads 飯店食記廢發——把「飯店早餐」這件事寫到位，自帶共鳴跟笑點
variations: 我訂飯店不是為了床，是為了早餐券。
飯店早餐的真理：第一輪先勘查、第二輪鎖定目標、第三輪是榮譽戰役。

en.content:
The hotel breakfast buffet
is the only reason I'll set an alarm on vacation.

And how much I eat
is already priced into the room.
Not eating it is basically losing money.
en.editorNote: For the overflowing-plate flat lay, the buffet-table wide shot, or the Threads breakfast confession — captures the universal hotel breakfast strategy
variations: I don't book hotels for the bed. I book them for the breakfast voucher.
Buffet rules: first round is reconnaissance, second round is target acquisition, third round is honor.

items.sourceNote: sunscreen / 防曬 register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我的海邊行程：
上午——抹防曬。
中午——補防曬。
下午——後悔沒補防曬。
晚上——全身像一隻煮過頭的蝦子，
反省人生。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合海邊度假回來曬傷的 IG 限動、Threads 痛苦自嘲文、剝皮中的手臂特寫——把每個出國海邊曬傷的人都中過的劫寫成段子
variations: 我以為我有抹防曬，但顯然我抹得不夠誠懇。
海邊三日後的我：膚色像旅遊紀念品，痛感是免費贈品。

en.content:
My beach itinerary:
morning — apply sunscreen.
noon — reapply sunscreen.
afternoon — regret not reapplying sunscreen.
evening — look like an overcooked shrimp
and reflect on my life choices.
en.editorNote: For the post-beach lobster-red selfie, the peeling-skin close-up, or the Threads sunburn lament — every traveler has lived this exact arc
variations: I thought I applied sunscreen. Apparently not sincerely enough.
Three days at the beach: my new tan is a souvenir, the pain is a complimentary gift.

items.sourceNote: post-vacation blues / 收假症候群 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
收假後的第一個週一，
我盯著電腦螢幕三小時，
才終於想起：
我的職稱、我的密碼、
還有「我到底為什麼要回來」。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合收假回辦公室第一天的 IG 限動、Threads 哀號短發、星期一早晨的 LINE 群組廢文——把上班族最痛的「收假後失憶症」寫到位
variations: 收假症候群的症狀：對著未讀信件發呆、忘記同事的名字、心裡循環播放上次旅行的海浪聲。
我不是不想工作，我是還沒從上一個時區的我切換回來。

en.content:
First Monday back from vacation,
I stared at my screen for three hours
before I finally remembered:
my job title, my password,
and why I came back at all.
en.editorNote: For the back-to-desk selfie, the unread-emails screenshot, or the Sunday-night Threads dread post — captures the surreal amnesia of the first day back
variations: Post-vacation symptoms: staring at unread emails, forgetting your coworker's name, mental playback of last week's waves on loop.
I'm not refusing to work. I just haven't switched back from the version of me that lived in another time zone.

items.sourceNote: travel insurance / 出國買保險焦慮 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
買旅平險的時候，
業務員問我要不要加保意外，
我才驚覺
原來我這趟旅行
預設值是什麼都會出事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合機場保險櫃台前的自拍、出發前一天填保單的 Threads 廢發、跟朋友討論意外險的 LINE 對話——把出國前焦慮寫得很有畫面感
variations: 出國前我才發現，買保險是把自己對未知的恐懼明碼標價的過程。
我不是悲觀，我只是把每一種「萬一」都付了錢請別人幫我擔心。

en.content:
When the agent asked
if I wanted to add accident coverage,
that's when it hit me:
this trip is apparently
set to 'something will go wrong' by default.
en.editorNote: For the insurance-counter selfie at the airport, the policy-paperwork flat lay, or the Threads pre-trip anxiety post — names the surreal moment of pricing your own paranoia
variations: Buying travel insurance is just putting a price tag on every fear you didn't know you had.
I'm not pessimistic. I just paid someone else to worry about every possible 'what if' on my behalf.

items.sourceNote: 「tropic like it's hot」 經典雙關 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我來到南方島嶼的第一件事，
不是看海、不是拍照，
是站在便利商店門口的冷氣前
感謝祖先把我生在會發明空調的時代。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合熱帶度假被熱到融化的 IG 限動、便利商店門口的廢拍照、Threads 出國熱當天的抒發——把「來度假」 的浪漫濾鏡撕掉一層，超有共鳴
variations: 南方旅行教我的事：景點可以排隊，但便利商店的冷氣是上天賜的福。
我以為我來追日落，後來發現我主要在追每一段室內冷氣的接力。

en.content:
First thing I did on the tropical island
wasn't see the beach
or take a photo.

I stood in front of the convenience store AC
and silently thanked
whoever invented refrigeration.
en.editorNote: For the melting-in-the-sun selfie, the 7-Eleven storefront snap, or any tropical-trip Threads complaint — pierces the postcard fantasy in a way every traveler recognizes
variations: Tropical travel taught me: tourist sites can wait, but the AC inside a convenience store is sacred.
I thought I came for the sunset. Turns out I came to relay-race between every air-conditioned room I could find.

items.sourceNote: rainy day vacation register，原創

zh-tw.content:
旅行碰到下雨的那一天，
你才會真正認識一個城市：
它的咖啡店、它的書店、
還有它的人
在沒有陽光的時候
長什麼樣子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合下雨天窩咖啡店的窗景照、潮濕街道的 IG 限動、Threads 旅行心得短發——把「掃興天氣」重新詮釋為「真正深入」
variations: 下雨不是壞天氣，是城市願意讓你看見它素顏的那一面。
好天氣的旅行像濾鏡，雨天的旅行才是原檔。

en.content:
You don't really know a city
until you've spent a rainy day in it.

Its cafes, its bookstores,
and the way its people move
when the sun isn't watching.
en.editorNote: For the rain-on-the-window cafe shot, the wet-cobblestone street photo, or the Threads reflection on a 'ruined' day — turns bad weather into the real version of the city
variations: Rain isn't bad weather. It's the city showing you its face without makeup.
Sunny travel days are the filter. Rainy ones are the raw file.

items.sourceNote: 公園長椅 / 慢下來 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我這趟旅行最值得的一筆消費，
是零元。

我在一張公園長椅上
坐了一個半小時，
什麼也沒做，
卻覺得這幾個月
第一次沒有趕路。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合公園長椅平視拍、緩步走過廣場的 IG 限動、Threads 旅行心得長文——把「什麼都沒做」這件事浪漫化，比打卡景點更有故事感
variations: 最奢侈的旅行不是住五星級，是允許自己一整個下午什麼也不做。
我花了機票錢、住宿錢，最後最捨不得的是那一張免費的長椅。

en.content:
The best money I spent on this trip
was zero.

I sat on a park bench
for ninety minutes,
did absolutely nothing,
and for the first time in months
felt like I wasn't running late.
en.editorNote: For the empty park-bench wide shot, the slow-walking-through-a-plaza story, or the Threads slow-travel reflection — romanticizes doing nothing in a way that hits harder than any landmark check-in
variations: The most luxurious thing about travel isn't five-star hotels. It's giving yourself permission to do absolutely nothing for an afternoon.
I paid for the flight, the hotel, the meals — and the thing I'll miss most is a bench that cost me nothing.

items.sourceNote: 「catch flights not feelings」 經典 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
別人說：要追夢，不要追人。

我說：要追早鳥票，
要追剩兩席的廉航，
要追台幣升值的那個禮拜，
別人的心就讓他自己飛吧。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合搶票截圖的 IG 限動、Threads 廢文、跟朋友炫耀剛訂到的機票——把「灑脫」演繹成最廉航最摳門的版本，比原版好笑十倍
variations: 我這人很專一，只追機票跟匯率。
感情我不追，因為它沒有早鳥優惠。

en.content:
They say: chase your dreams, not people.

I say: chase early-bird fares,
chase the last two seats on a budget airline,
chase the week the exchange rate finally tips in your favor.

Let other people's hearts fly themselves.
en.editorNote: For the deal-alert screenshot, the just-booked-it Threads brag, or the airline-app selfie — flips the classic 'catch flights not feelings' line into something more chronically online and broke
variations: I'm extremely loyal. I only chase flights and favorable exchange rates.
I don't chase love. Love doesn't come with an early-bird discount.

items.sourceNote: 「airport is a lawless place」 register，重新改寫成台灣脈絡

zh-tw.content:
機場是個沒有時間的地方。

早上六點？
喝啤酒沒問題。
累了？
直接躺在地板睡。
肚子餓？
一份炒麵 380 塊
而且你不會跟它計較。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合凌晨機場登機口的限動、轉機等待長文、Threads 旅行廢文——把機場那種「物理規則暫停運作」的詭異感寫進去，比裝勵志的「啟程」文有共鳴一百倍
variations: 在機場的時間不算時間，在機場的卡路里也不算卡路里。
機場唯一的法律就是：你已經付過錢了，所以你不能生氣。

en.content:
The airport exists outside of time.

Six a.m.?
Have a beer.
Tired?
Sleep on the floor like everyone else.
Hungry?
That's a fourteen-dollar pretzel
and you're going to thank it.
en.editorNote: For the pre-boarding gate Story, the long layover Threads post, or any caption acknowledging that airports are not part of normal civilization — lands harder than performative wanderlust
variations: Calories don't count in airports. Neither does the time on your phone, apparently.
Airport rule one: you already paid for it, so you are not allowed to be upset about it.

items.sourceNote: 「The world is a book」 frame，重新改寫成 2026 滑手機世代

zh-tw.content:
世界是一本書，
你只待在家裡，
就只讀過演算法
推給你的那一頁。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合飛行途中俯瞰窗外照、旅行回顧短片開頭、Threads 短發——把經典「世界是一本書」更新成這個世代真正能聽進去的版本，順便酸一下同溫層
variations: 不出門的人，世界對他來說就是 IG 動態跟外送 App。
你以為你看過世界，其實你只是把演算法當成地圖。

en.content:
The world is a book.
If you never leave home,
you've only read the page
the algorithm picked for you.
en.editorNote: For the window-seat aerial photo, the year-in-travel recap intro, or the Threads one-liner — modernizes the classic Augustine line in a way that actually lands in 2026
variations: If you never travel, your entire worldview is just a For You page.
You haven't seen the world. You've seen what the algorithm thinks you'll click on.

items.sourceNote: 「jet lag is my body telling me」 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
時差是身體跟我說：
你最近做的決定太多，
它需要時間
分批處理。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合回國第二天還在恍神的限動、深夜清醒滑手機的廢文、Threads 時差日記——把時差擬人化成「需要時間消化」的同事，比抱怨「好累」有畫面感
variations: 我不是還沒倒時差，是這趟旅行的訊息量太大，身體還在 buffer。
醫生說那是時差，我覺得那是我的人生在重新開機。

en.content:
Jet lag is my body saying:
you made too many decisions recently
and it needs a few business days
to process them all.
en.editorNote: For the day-three-back-and-still-foggy Story, the 3 a.m. doomscroll caption, or the Threads jet-lag confessional — anthropomorphizes jet lag into an overwhelmed coworker, which is funnier than any 'so tired' post
variations: It's not jet lag. My nervous system is just buffering after a high-resolution week.
The doctor calls it jet lag. I call it my soul rebooting in the wrong time zone.

items.sourceNote: 提前三小時到機場 Dcard 討論，原創 frame

zh-tw.content:
我朋友說他是隨性派，
登機前一小時才到機場。

我是焦慮派，
登機前三小時就到，
在登機門對面的咖啡廳，
用焦慮的方式
看了三小時的我朋友
還沒到。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合一個人坐在登機門咖啡廳發限動、跟朋友群組吐槽、Threads 焦慮派出國心得——把「提前到機場」的執著寫成性格特徵，比一般抱怨同伴遲到好笑
variations: 我不是準時，我是用比準時更早三小時的方式來抵抗世界的不可控。
焦慮派旅人的浪漫：在登機門對面，已經坐到認識櫃檯店員的小孩。

en.content:
My friend is chill.
He gets to the airport one hour before boarding.

I am not chill.
I get there three hours early,
sit at the cafe across from the gate,
and spend those three hours anxiously watching
for my friend
who still isn't there.
en.editorNote: For the solo-at-the-gate-cafe Story, the group-chat vent, or the Threads anxious-traveler bit — turns 'arriving early' into a personality type, which lands harder than complaining about a late friend
variations: I'm not punctual. I'm three hours early as a coping mechanism for things I can't control.
The romance of an anxious traveler: at the gate so early the barista's child has learned my name.

items.sourceNote: 「collect moments not things」 frame，重新改寫成 2026 行李託運脈絡

zh-tw.content:
他們說：
要蒐集回憶，不要蒐集東西。

但我這趟旅行帶回來的，
是七公斤的回憶
跟超重 23 公斤的東西，
託運費就花了一張機票。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合機場行李秤上的特寫、回家整理戰利品的廢文、Threads 旅行決算文——把「不執著於物質」這種高大上的概念，用台幣兩千的超重費打臉，比說教文有人性
variations: 我蒐集的不是回憶，是每一張看似不需要、結果回來都會用到的紀念品。
我這個人很簡樸，只是行李剛好都超重而已。

en.content:
They say:
collect moments, not things.

But what I brought back from this trip
was seven kilograms of memories
and twenty-three kilograms of things,
and the overweight fee
cost more than my return flight.
en.editorNote: For the airport-scale close-up, the unpacking-the-haul caption, or the Threads post-trip reckoning — undercuts the lofty 'collect moments' line with a very real overweight-baggage fee, which feels more honest than any minimalist pep talk
variations: I don't collect souvenirs. I collect objects I will swear I needed the moment customs asks me about them.
I live a minimalist life. My checked bag, however, does not.

items.sourceNote: Jet lag「身體在這裡、靈魂在另一個時區」frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
時差是一種很特別的體驗：
身體已經回家了，
靈魂還卡在登機門 B7，
胃在想要吃宵夜還是早餐。
zh-tw.editorNote: 回國後第二天最有共鳴的 frame——適合 Threads 早上四點睡不著的廢文、IG 限動配上凌晨亂吃的泡麵照、或者請假在家的自嘲訊息
variations: 我沒有失眠，我只是身體還在台灣，但靈魂留在東京的便利店裡選飯糰。
時差讓我同時擁有兩個時區的疲倦，跟零個時區的精神。

en.content:
Jet lag is a unique experience:
your body is home,
your soul is still at Gate B7,
and your stomach is asking
if this counts as a midnight snack
or breakfast.
en.editorNote: Lands hardest the day after a long-haul return — works for a 4 a.m. Threads post, an Instagram Story of instant noodles in bed, or that self-aware Slack message about why you're taking a personal day
variations: I'm not jet lagged. I'm just emotionally still at the gate, eating airport sushi out of spite.
Jet lag is having two time zones' worth of tiredness and zero time zones' worth of energy.

items.sourceNote: 獨自旅行飯店自助早餐的觀察，原創 frame

zh-tw.content:
一個人旅行最大的修練，
是在飯店自助早餐區，
第三次回去夾培根，
依然從容地假裝自己只是路過。
zh-tw.editorNote: 獨旅最 specific 的尷尬瞬間 frame——適合 Threads 獨旅日記、IG 飯店早餐照配文、或朋友問「自己一個人吃飯不會奇怪嗎」時的最佳回應
variations: 獨旅教會我最重要的事：第四盤可頌可以拿，只要動作夠自然。
我不是一個人尷尬地吃早餐，我是在進行密集的碳水化合物研究。

en.content:
The hardest part of solo travel
isn't loneliness.

It's walking back to the breakfast buffet
for the third plate of bacon
while pretending
you're just passing through.
en.editorNote: Captures the very specific solo-traveler buffet shame spiral — perfect for a Threads solo-trip diary, a hotel-breakfast Story, or the reply you send when a friend asks if you ever feel weird eating alone
variations: Solo travel taught me one thing: a fourth croissant is acceptable as long as your face says 'just stretching my legs.'
I'm not awkwardly eating breakfast alone. I'm conducting independent carbohydrate research.

items.sourceNote: 回家後的反差感 frame，原創 rewrite

zh-tw.content:
出國前：
我要去找一個全新的自己。

回國後：
那個自己回來了，
還帶了 18 公斤的待洗衣服，
跟一張看不太懂的信用卡帳單。
zh-tw.editorNote: 旅行 vs. 回到現實的對照 frame，是最多人轉發的廢文型 register——適合配回家洗衣機照、信用卡帳單截圖、或剛回到家攤在沙發上的自拍
variations: 出國前我以為旅行會改變我，回國後發現它改變的是我的銀行餘額。
我帶了一個更開闊的世界觀回來，跟一台快爆炸的洗衣機。

en.content:
Before the trip:
I'm going to find a whole new version of myself.

After the trip:
That version came back,
with 40 pounds of laundry
and a credit card statement
I cannot bring myself to read.
en.editorNote: The 'travel changes you' bait-and-switch — works for the unpacking-on-the-couch caption, the post-trip Threads dump, or any moment where vacation reality meets actual reality
variations: I thought travel would change me. Turns out it just changed my bank balance.
I came back with a broader worldview and a washing machine on the verge of giving up.

items.sourceNote: 廢話文學 × 護照 frame，原創

zh-tw.content:
護照最神奇的地方在於——
沒帶的時候，
你就出不了國；
有帶的時候，
你才有機會出國。
zh-tw.editorNote: 教科書級的廢話文學 frame，套在旅行語境特別有畫面感——適合在朋友群組丟給準備出國的人、IG 護照特寫配文、或抵達機場後的限動
variations: 出國這件事的關鍵，是你必須先離開你原本的國家。
護照的意義就是：當海關問你是誰，你可以給他看護照。

en.content:
The amazing thing about a passport is this:
if you don't have it,
you can't leave the country.
If you do have it,
you can.

That's the whole system.
en.editorNote: Deadpan absurdist register — pairs perfectly with a passport close-up, an airport check-in Story, or a group-chat message to the friend who is, once again, looking for their passport
variations: The trick to international travel is leaving the country you are currently in.
A passport is a small book that proves you are the person the small book says you are.

items.sourceNote: 「我需要一年放兩次六個月假」經典 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不是想離職，
我只是需要一年放兩次
各六個月的長假，
中間用兩週的工作
來支付下一段旅費。
zh-tw.editorNote: 辭職焦慮季最有共鳴的 frame——適合年中考績後的 Threads 廢文、看到同事請年假的 IG 限動、或在公司茶水間轉發給同事的 LINE 截圖；把「我需要假期」用算式講出來特別療癒
variations: 我不是怕上班，我只是更喜歡不上班的那 50 個禮拜。
其實我蠻熱愛我的工作的，特別是工作以外的那部分。

en.content:
I don't need to quit my job.
I just need
two six-month vacations a year,
with maybe a quick two-week sprint of work in between
to fund the next one.
en.editorNote: Drops perfectly mid-year when everyone is eyeing their PTO balance — works for the Slack-status-update screenshot, the LinkedIn-adjacent burnout post, or any Story captioned over a sad office cubicle photo
variations: I don't hate work. I just prefer the 50 weeks of the year that aren't it.
My ideal work-life balance is mostly the life part, lightly seasoned with work.

items.sourceNote: 「跑去登機門 B42」短跑運動員 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我這輩子跑最快的時候，
不是體育課，
不是趕公車，
是在桃園機場第二航廈
從 D5 衝到 A8 的那 11 分鐘。
zh-tw.editorNote: 轉機族的 universal 共鳴 frame——適合配奔跑模糊照、登機門特寫、或剛飛抵後癱在 Airbnb 沙發上發的廢文；把「我是運動員」這種人設用最尷尬的場景拆穿，特別好笑
variations: 我從不運動，除非機場廣播叫到我的名字。
登機門換 terminal 是台灣人最後一項全民運動。

en.content:
The fastest I have ever run in my life
was not in gym class,
not to catch a bus,
but from Gate D5 to Gate A8
at 6:47 a.m.
with a backpack flapping behind me
like a small frightened animal.
en.editorNote: The connecting-flight sprint is a near-universal experience — pairs with a blurry running-through-terminal photo, a gate-board close-up, or the airport floor selfie taken after collapsing at the new gate
variations: I don't exercise. Unless the airport PA system says my name.
I'm not athletic. I'm just chronically twenty minutes late to my own flights.

items.sourceNote: 「一個人吃飯不會孤獨」獨旅 frame，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
服務生問：
「請問幾位？」

我說：
「一位。」

他點點頭，
但他遞給我的菜單，
是兩本。
zh-tw.editorNote: 獨旅者最具體的尷尬瞬間——適合 Threads 獨旅日記、IG 餐廳桌面照配文、或回給朋友「自己一個人吃飯不會奇怪嗎」的最佳貼圖式回應；不靠抱怨、靠細節，比較有畫面感
variations: 獨旅最大的考驗，不是寂寞，是被帶到四人桌然後對面坐著我的後背包。
服務生最常問我的問題是「還有人會來嗎」，最常的答案是「沒有，但我的食慾算兩個人」。

en.content:
The waiter asked,
"How many?"

I said,
"Just one."

He nodded politely,
and then handed me
two menus.
en.editorNote: A very specific solo-travel moment that lands without ever using the word 'lonely' — perfect for a Threads dinner-out diary, an Instagram shot of an empty seat across the table, or the deadpan reply when someone asks if solo dining is weird
variations: The hardest part of solo travel isn't loneliness. It's being seated at a four-top across from my backpack.
Most asked question on this trip: 'Is anyone joining you?' Most accurate answer: 'No, but my appetite counts as two.'

items.sourceNote: 「旅行的意義」嚴肅 frame 的廢話文學翻轉，原創

zh-tw.content:
旅行的意義是什麼？

旅行的意義
就是你決定要去旅行，
然後你去了，
回來以後，
你就旅行完了。
zh-tw.editorNote: 教科書級廢話文學套在「旅行的意義」這種被問爛的大哉問上，特別解氣——適合 Threads 嘴砲文、IG 文藝旅遊照下的反差配文、或在朋友認真問你旅行心得時的最佳回應
variations: 旅行最深的意義，是它有開始，有過程，有結束。
旅行教會我最重要的事，就是當你回到家，你就不在旅行的地方了。

en.content:
What is the meaning of travel?

The meaning of travel
is that you decide to travel,
then you travel,
and then, eventually,
you are done traveling.

That is the meaning.
en.editorNote: Deadpan absurdist take on the most over-asked travel question — works as a counter-caption under an annoyingly artsy landscape photo, a Threads roast of every travel-blogger intro paragraph, or the answer you give the relative who keeps asking what you 'learned' on your trip
variations: Travel has a beginning, a middle, and an end. That is, in fact, the whole shape of it.
The most important thing travel taught me is that when you go home, you are no longer in the place you went to.

items.sourceNote: 「買機票就是買快樂」frame，原創 rewrite + 台灣信用卡細節

zh-tw.content:
有人說錢買不到快樂，
但機票買得到，
而機票要用錢買，
所以理論上
錢還是可以買到快樂，
只是要轉一手。
zh-tw.editorNote: 經典「錢買不到快樂」反論的台灣式延伸——適合刷卡買機票截圖配文、信用卡帳單來的 Threads 廢文、或朋友勸你不要亂花錢時的反駁素材；把資本主義邏輯說得像國高中數學證明題
variations: 錢買不到快樂，但可以買到信用卡分期付款的快樂。
我不是亂花錢，我只是在用刷卡的方式累積航空哩程的精神財富。

en.content:
They say money can't buy happiness.

But money can buy plane tickets,
and plane tickets can buy happiness,
so technically,
money can buy happiness —
it just takes one extra step.
en.editorNote: Pure capitalist syllogism dressed up as a travel caption — perfect for the screenshot of a flight booking confirmation, a Threads response to anyone lecturing you about saving, or the IG caption under a window-seat photo right after you ignored your budget
variations: Money can't buy happiness, but it can buy a flight to a place where I forget about money for ten days.
I don't overspend on travel. I invest in long-term, full-color memories with a strong APR.

items.sourceNote: 經濟艙膝蓋下巴梗的重新改寫，加台灣廉航 context

zh-tw.content:
搭廉航經濟艙的最大好處，
就是讓你的膝蓋
跟你的下巴，
終於有機會
認識一下彼此。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合搭虎航酷航回來的崩潰 Threads 廢文、IG 限動配窗外的雲、或朋友問你為什麼回國一直喊腰痛時的標準答案；廉航體感的精準描寫
variations: 我不是在睡覺，我是在用膝蓋頂著下巴練習瑜伽。
經濟艙不是空間小，是你跟自己身體距離突然變很近。

en.content:
The best part of flying economy
is that your knees
and your chin
finally get a chance
to really get to know each other.
en.editorNote: Perfect for the post-red-eye selfie caption, a Threads vent after a budget airline flight, or the deadpan reply when someone asks if you got any sleep on the plane
variations: I didn't sleep on the flight. I just folded myself into a smaller, sadder shape for nine hours.
Economy class is where you discover muscle groups you didn't know could cramp.

items.sourceNote: Jet lag is just time travel with worse customer service 的改寫延伸

zh-tw.content:
時差不是病，
是身體在不同時區
各自開了一個分公司，
互相不通知對方
要幾點上班。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合凌晨四點睡不著的 Threads 廢文、IG 限動配飯店天花板照、或回國一週還在亂睡時跟主管請假的標準說法；用辦公室梗包裝身體的混亂
variations: 我沒有失眠，我只是身體還在巴黎打卡上班。
時差就是你的胃跟你的眼皮意見不合，然後輪流投票要不要醒著。

en.content:
Jet lag isn't a condition.

It's just your body running
three understaffed branch offices
in different time zones
and none of them
share a calendar.
en.editorNote: Lands as a 4 a.m. Threads post from a hotel bed, the caption under a ceiling photo on Day 3 of recovery, or the excuse you DM your boss when you sleep through Monday morning
variations: I'm not jet-lagged. My body is still clocking in at the Tokyo branch.
Jet lag: when your stomach, your eyes, and your dignity all want to nap at different times.

items.sourceNote: Souvenirs 過度購物梗的重新組合，加台灣機場磁鐵 context

zh-tw.content:
我不是在買紀念品，
我是在花真錢，
買一個之後
會堆在抽屜裡
再也不會看第二眼
的小磁鐵。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合配機場免稅店爆買戰利品的 IG、Threads 自嘲廢文、或朋友問你為什麼又買冰箱磁鐵的標準答案；把過度購物寫得像會計報告
variations: 我家冰箱上的磁鐵，比我這輩子去過的地方還多。
紀念品不是用來紀念旅行的，是用來提醒你那天免稅店有冷氣。

en.content:
I'm not buying souvenirs.

I'm spending real money
on a tiny magnet
that will live in a drawer
and never
be looked at again.
en.editorNote: Pairs well with a duty-free haul photo, a Threads roast of your own shopping habits, or the IG caption under that pile of keychains you swore you needed
variations: My fridge has been to more places than my passport has.
Souvenirs aren't to remember the trip. They're to remember the air conditioning at the gift shop.

items.sourceNote: 回國後第一頓泡麵/家常菜的 frame，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
出國十天最想念的，
不是家人，
不是床，
是回家以後
那一碗
半夜兩點配新聞重播
的科學麵。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合回國第一天 Threads 報平安廢文、IG 限動配泡麵照、或被問「國外好玩嗎」時的真心答案；把 Taiwanese homesickness 寫得很具體、很俗、很真
variations: 出國最大的收穫，是讓你重新發現 7-11 的偉大。
旅行回來才發現，我想念的不是台灣，是台灣的便利商店冰櫃。

en.content:
After ten days abroad,
the thing I missed most
wasn't my family,
wasn't my bed.

It was the bowl of instant noodles
at 2 a.m.
with the news on repeat
when I finally got home.
en.editorNote: Hits as a 'just landed' Threads post, an IG caption under a midnight ramen shot, or the honest answer to 'how was the trip?' when you're too tired to be poetic
variations: Going abroad's greatest gift is rediscovering how good a Taiwanese convenience store actually is.
I didn't miss home. I missed the fluorescent-lit fridge aisle at the 7-Eleven down the street.

items.sourceNote: 「hotel looks nothing like the photos」 經典 frame，加台灣訂房網語感改寫

zh-tw.content:
訂房網的照片，
是攝影師的作品。

實際的房間，
是命運的作品。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合 Threads 抱怨訂房踩雷的廢文、IG 限動配「實際 vs 期待」對比圖、跟朋友抱怨爛飯店時的開場白——把訂房 gamble 寫得很有哲學味
variations: Booking.com 的廣角鏡頭，是我這輩子看過最有想像力的文學作品。
飯店照片騙人不犯法，因為那已經算是再創作了。

en.content:
The photos on the booking site
are the work of a photographer.

The room you actually get
is the work of fate.
en.editorNote: Lands as a Threads rant after a hotel disappointment, an IG side-by-side of 'expectation vs. reality,' or the opening line when you're telling friends about your worst stay
variations: The wide-angle lens used on hotel listings is the most creative writing I've ever seen.
Hotel photos aren't lies. They're just an artistic interpretation of the truth.

items.sourceNote: 「solo dining 練習表情」frame，原創改寫加台灣一人食 context

zh-tw.content:
一個人旅行最難的，
不是訂房，
不是迷路，
是進餐廳的時候
要練習
「我一個人吃飯
也很自在」
的表情。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合獨旅 IG 餐桌照 caption、Threads 一人食廢文、或回應「你一個人旅行不會無聊嗎」的標準答案；把獨旅的微小尷尬寫到位
variations: 一個人吃飯不孤單，孤單的是手機沒電還沒拍到食物。
獨旅最大的成就，是學會在沒人對話的桌子上把整套套餐吃完。

en.content:
The hardest part of solo travel
isn't booking the room,
or finding your way.

It's walking into a restaurant
and practicing the face
that says,
'I'm totally fine
eating alone.'
en.editorNote: Pairs with a solo-dinner IG shot, a Threads post about one-person tables, or the comeback when someone asks if you get lonely traveling alone — captures the tiny awkwardness no one talks about
variations: Eating alone isn't lonely. What's lonely is your phone dying before you can photograph the food.
The real solo-travel milestone is finishing a three-course meal without anyone to talk to.

items.sourceNote: 飯店早餐自助 buffet 的暴食 frame，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
飯店早餐不是一頓飯，
是一場
你要在十一點前
把房錢吃回來
的限時挑戰。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合 IG 配早餐 buffet 戰利品照、Threads 抱怨吃太飽走不動的廢文、跟旅伴互相打氣「再吃一盤」的標準理由——把住宿成本回收寫得像比賽
variations: 我不是貪心，我是負責任地把含早餐的房價吃完。
飯店早餐的存在意義，是讓你中午根本不會餓，午餐預算自動省下來。

en.content:
Hotel breakfast isn't a meal.

It's a timed challenge
to eat back
the cost of the room
before 11 a.m.
en.editorNote: For the buffet-plate IG, the Threads post about being too full to move, or the standard 'just one more plate' rallying cry to your travel buddy — reframes overeating as fiscal responsibility
variations: I'm not greedy. I'm just being responsible about the 'breakfast included' clause.
The point of hotel breakfast is to make lunch financially unnecessary.

items.sourceNote: 「lost luggage」+ 命運 frame，重新組合改寫

zh-tw.content:
我的行李這次去了
一個我這輩子都不會去的城市，
吃了
我這輩子吃不到的早餐，
然後
比我晚三天
才回家。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行李遺失抱怨的 Threads 廢文、IG 限動配空蕩蕩行李轉盤照、跟朋友炫耀「我行李去了比我多」的金句——把倒楣寫得有種羨慕感
variations: 我的行李這趟旅行比我還精彩，回來時還帶了三張標籤。
搞丟行李最痛的不是沒衣服穿，是想到它在沒有你的航班上看了夕陽。

en.content:
My luggage went
to a city I'll never visit,
ate a breakfast
I'll never try,
and came home
three days
after I did.
en.editorNote: Drops well as a Threads rant about lost bags, an IG story under an empty baggage carousel shot, or the line you use to one-up friends' travel stories — makes bad luck sound almost enviable
variations: My suitcase had a better trip than I did and came back with three new airline tags to prove it.
The worst part of lost luggage isn't the missing clothes. It's knowing your bag saw a sunset without you.

items.sourceNote: 「找路回飯店」 frame，原創改寫加 Google Maps 語境

zh-tw.content:
出國旅行的真正目的，
不是看世界，
是每天傍晚
跟 Google Maps
吵架五十分鐘
還是找不到
飯店在哪一條巷子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合 Threads 迷路廢文、IG 限動配巷弄歪斜照、跟旅伴互相怪罪導航的對話金句——把迷路寫成旅行的核心活動，誰看了都心有戚戚焉
variations: Google Maps 在國外的功能，是讓你優雅地走錯路。
我這趟旅行最大的進步，是學會用三種語言問路然後還是聽不懂。

en.content:
The real purpose of travel
isn't to see the world.

It's to argue with Google Maps
for fifty minutes every evening
and still not know
which alley
the hotel is on.
en.editorNote: For the Threads 'lost again' post, the IG story under a crooked-alley shot, or the running joke with your travel buddy about whose turn it is to blame the GPS — makes getting lost feel like the whole point
variations: Google Maps abroad: a tool for getting elegantly lost.
My biggest takeaway from this trip is learning to ask for directions in three languages and still not understanding the answer.

items.sourceNote: 「機場是法外之地」frame，重新組合改寫

zh-tw.content:
機場是法外之地：
早上七點
喝啤酒沒人管，
累了
直接睡地板，
一包洋芋片
要價兩百八，
你還會
甘願付錢。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合候機室自拍配 IG 限動、Threads 抱怨機場物價的廢文、跟朋友解釋為什麼旅行還沒開始就先花了五百塊——把機場的荒謬寫成被默許的生活破口
variations: 機場唯一的規則，就是沒有規則，還有一包餅乾兩百八。
在機場做什麼都不會被審判，除了你的信用卡帳單。

en.content:
The airport is a lawless place.
7 a.m.? Have a beer.
Tired? Sleep on the floor.
Hungry?
These chips
are nine dollars
and you'll pay
without flinching.
en.editorNote: Drops well as a boarding-gate selfie caption, a Threads rant about airport pricing, or the line you text a friend at 6 a.m. to justify the pre-flight beer — frames airport chaos as a sanctioned loophole in normal life
variations: The only rule at the airport is that there are no rules, and also the chips are nine dollars.
Nothing you do at the airport counts — except the charges on your credit card statement.

items.sourceNote: 「行李比我有精神」+ 時差 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我不是累，
我只是
對機場貴賓室的
沙發
動了真感情。
我的行李
現在比我
還有精神。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合長途轉機癱在沙發上的自拍 IG 文、Threads 自嘲時差的廢話金句、跟旅伴互嗆「誰先睡著」的對話 punchline——把疲累寫成一種柔情
variations: 時差不是病，是身體偷偷留在了上一座城市還沒回來。
我這輩子最深刻的感情，是給貴賓室那張靠窗的沙發。

en.content:
I'm not tired.
I'm just emotionally invested
in this lounge chair.
My suitcase
has more energy
than I do
right now.
en.editorNote: Perfect for the long-layover slumped-on-a-couch selfie, a Threads jet-lag confession, or the running joke with your travel buddy about who'll pass out first — reframes exhaustion as a tender, almost romantic attachment
variations: Jet lag isn't a condition. It's part of you quietly refusing to leave the last city.
The deepest relationship I've had this year is with the window seat in the airport lounge.

items.sourceNote: 「我來、我看、我迷路、我找到酒吧」古典 frame 改寫

zh-tw.content:
我來，
我看，
我迷路，
然後
我在一間
不在行程裡的
小酒館
找到了
這趟旅行
最好的故事。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合迷路後意外發現好店的 IG 打卡文、Threads 自我安慰廢文、跟朋友炫耀「沒做功課反而最值得」的金句——把脫稿演出寫成旅行的真正高潮
variations: 行程表的功能，是讓你脫離它之後感覺更刺激。
我這趟旅行最好的回憶，都發生在原本不該轉進去的那條巷子。

en.content:
I came,
I saw,
I got lost,
and I found
the best story
of this trip
in a bar
that wasn't
on the itinerary.
en.editorNote: Works as an IG caption for the accidental-find restaurant shot, a Threads post about ditching the schedule, or the line you tell friends to justify zero pre-trip research — frames going off-script as the actual peak of the trip
variations: The purpose of an itinerary is to feel slightly more alive the moment you abandon it.
Every good memory from this trip happened on a street I wasn't supposed to turn down.

items.sourceNote: 「Travel is the only thing you buy that makes you richer」改寫，加台幣語境

zh-tw.content:
旅行是
唯一一筆
刷下去之後
戶頭變少、
人卻變得
比較有故事
的消費。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合刷卡買機票後的自我安慰 IG 文、Threads 月底窮但快樂的廢文、跟長輩解釋為什麼又出國的金句——把花錢寫成一種隱性投資，誰看了都點頭
variations: 旅行是合法的、能讓你把存款換成回憶的詐欺。
我的戶頭少了一個零，但我多了三個能講十年的故事。

en.content:
Travel is the only purchase
that leaves your bank account smaller
and somehow
leaves you
with more interesting things
to say at dinner.
en.editorNote: Drops well after the post-booking screenshot, a Threads 'broke but happy' post, or the line you use to explain to your parents why you're flying out again — frames spending as quiet self-investment that nobody can argue with
variations: Travel is the only legal way to swap your savings account for better dinner stories.
My bank balance lost a zero. I gained three stories I'll be telling for the next decade.

items.sourceNote: 「回程行李比較重」+ 紀念品 frame，重新組合改寫

zh-tw.content:
去程的行李
裝的是計畫，
回程的行李
裝的是
三塊磁鐵、
兩包茶葉、
一個我發誓
用得到的
奇怪手工皂，
還有
一點點
變了的我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合回國當天倒空行李箱配 IG 文、Threads 整理紀念品的廢話金句、跟朋友解釋為什麼買了一堆用不到的東西——把過度購物寫成一種柔軟的自我證明
variations: 紀念品的功能不是好用，是讓未來的你某天打開抽屜會笑一下。
我帶回家的最重的東西，是當時還沒整理好的那個自己。

en.content:
The bag you fly out with
holds your plans.
The bag you fly home with
holds three fridge magnets,
two packs of tea,
one weird artisan soap
you swear
you'll use,
and a slightly
different version
of you.
en.editorNote: Perfect for the empty-suitcase-on-the-floor IG post, a Threads thread about unpacking souvenirs, or the line you text a friend defending the haul of useless trinkets — reframes over-buying as soft, tangible proof you came home a little changed
variations: Souvenirs aren't useful. They're future-you opening a drawer one day and smiling.
The heaviest thing I brought home was the version of myself I hadn't fully unpacked yet.

items.sourceNote: 2026 暑假 61 天 timely register，原創 frame

zh-tw.content:
暑假有 61 天，
我規劃了三場旅行、
五個展覽、
兩本書，
然後我會在第二天下午
躺在床上滑手機，
醒來時剩 47 天。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放暑假倒數的 Threads 廢文、IG 限動配天花板照、學生族跟上班族都中槍——把「計畫太多執行太少」 寫成暑假必經之痛，比直接喊「我廢」 有畫面感
variations: 暑假的長度，是計畫的兩倍、執行的一半。
我的暑假行事曆寫得像策展，實際過得像植物。

en.content:
Summer break is 61 days.
I planned three trips,
five exhibitions,
two books.

By day two
I was on my bed scrolling.
When I looked up
there were 47 days left.
en.editorNote: For the lying-on-the-bed ceiling shot, the calendar screenshot with mostly-empty squares, or the Threads confessional about wasted summer days — names the gap between planning and doing without scolding
variations: My summer is twice as long as my plans and half as long as my execution.
My summer calendar looks like a curator's notebook. My summer life looks like a houseplant.

items.sourceNote: 「watch more sunsets than Netflix」 2026 caption trend，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
這個夏天的目標：
看的日落比看的 Netflix 多，
泡的海水比泡的咖啡多，
講的廢話比回的工作訊息多。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合放在暑假出遊前的 IG bio、Threads 短發、海邊度假的 caption——三段式對比 frame 自帶節奏感，比一般「summer goals」 文有記憶點
variations: 今年夏天我打算少滑手機、多曬太陽，理論上啦。
我這個夏天的 KPI 是：每天看到一次日落，週末看到兩次海。

en.content:
Summer goals:
watch more sunsets than Netflix,
spend more time in the ocean than in coffee,
say more nonsense than work replies.
en.editorNote: Bio-line energy for the summer feed reset — pairs with a beach selfie, a sunset wide shot, or a Threads 'this is the year' post. The three-beat structure makes it more memorable than the usual summer-goals caption
variations: Less scrolling, more sunlight. Theoretically.
My summer KPIs: one sunset a day, two oceans a weekend.

items.sourceNote: 「off the beaten path」hidden gem frame，2026 演算法世代改寫

zh-tw.content:
所謂的小眾景點，
是別人 IG 還沒拍到的地方。

所謂的私房推薦，
是演算法還沒抓到的地方。

所謂的真實旅行，
是你願意自己走進去的地方。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合冷門小鎮的 IG caption、Threads 旅行心得長文、年末旅行回顧短片開頭——把「小眾」 重新定義，順便酸一下被演算法綁架的旅行文化
variations: 小眾景點的壽命，是從你拍到它的那一刻開始倒數。
我不是找私房景點，我是找一個沒被打卡毀掉的下午。

en.content:
A hidden gem
is a place no one has filmed yet.

An insider tip
is a place the algorithm hasn't found yet.

A real trip
is a place you were willing to walk into yourself.
en.editorNote: For the quiet-side-street photo, the slow-travel Threads reflection, or the year-end recap intro — redefines 'off the beaten path' for a generation whose paths are all algorithmically lit
variations: The lifespan of a hidden gem starts ticking down the second you post about it.
I'm not looking for a secret spot. I'm looking for an afternoon the For You page hasn't ruined yet.

items.sourceNote: 「if wanderlust were a currency I'd be bankrupt by Tuesday」 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
如果想出國的衝動可以換錢，
我大概是台北市最有錢的人之一。

可惜它不行，
所以我還是
每個月看著存款發呆。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合月底刷信用卡帳單後的 Threads 廢文、看到別人出國照的 IG 限動回應、跟同事互相取暖時的 LINE 訊息——把「想旅行的執念」 量化成貨幣，自嘲到位又不慘
variations: 如果想旅行的次數可以累積航空哩程，我早就升白金卡了。
我的旅行衝動指數跟我的存款餘額成反比。

en.content:
If wanderlust were currency,
I'd be one of the richest people in the city.

Unfortunately it isn't,
so I just keep
staring at my bank account
on the first of every month.
en.editorNote: For the end-of-month Threads vent, the response to someone else's vacation post, or the office-chat solidarity DM — quantifies the urge to travel into currency in a way that's self-aware without being bleak
variations: If every urge to book a flight counted as miles, I'd be platinum status by now.
My desire to travel is inversely proportional to my checking account balance.

items.sourceNote: 2026 燃油附加費漲價 timely register，原創

zh-tw.content:
2026 年最殘酷的旅行教育是：
你以為自己變窮了，
其實是機票變貴了，
而且還在繼續變貴。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 四月燃油附加費全面調漲的 timely 廢文——適合搶票截圖、Threads 抱怨文、跟旅伴互嘆的 LINE 訊息，把世道艱難寫成段子
variations: 我不是不會理財，是飛日本一張票越過我整個月的伙食費。
今年的機票價格教會我一件事：以前嫌貴的廉航，現在是奢侈品。

en.content:
The cruelest lesson of 2026:
you didn't get poorer.
Flights got more expensive.
And they're still climbing.
en.editorNote: Timely line for the 2026 fuel-surcharge era — pairs with a price-comparison screenshot, a Threads vent post, or the group-chat moment everyone realizes the cheap flight era is over
variations: I'm not bad with money. A round trip to Tokyo just costs more than my monthly groceries.
2026 taught me that the budget airline I used to complain about is now a luxury brand.

items.sourceNote: 暑假早鳥 / 預購 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
六月的我看著暑假行事曆，
覺得自己會去三個國家。

七月的我看著機票價格，
決定先在家裡規劃一下。

八月的我打開冷氣，
說明年再說。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合連假滑手機看別人出國的 Threads 自嘲、躺在冷氣房的 IG 限動、暑假倒數變成日曆裝飾的反省文——三段式時間 frame 把拖延寫得很有節奏
variations: 我的暑假分三階段：野心、議價、躺平。
每年六月我都覺得我會去環島，八月底我只環過我家附近的便利商店。

en.content:
In June, I look at the summer calendar
and decide I'll visit three countries.

In July, I check the flight prices
and decide to research a bit more first.

In August, I turn on the AC
and say: next year.
en.editorNote: For the lying-in-the-AC ceiling shot, the 'this could've been the summer' Threads post, or the scroll-through-other-people's-trips story — three-act structure gives the procrastination its own arc
variations: My summer comes in three phases: ambition, sticker shock, horizontal.
Every June I think I'll travel the country. Every August I've only traveled to the 7-Eleven downstairs.

items.sourceNote: 「happier than a seagull with a french fry」 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
海邊最快樂的不是我，
是那隻搶到我半根薯條的海鷗。

牠那天的目標達成率
比我整個 Q2 還高。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合海邊野餐被海鷗偷襲的 IG 限動、Threads 出遊廢文、跟同事炫耀請假的對比文——把職場 KPI 跟野生動物對照，自帶笑點
variations: 我這輩子最有效率的同事，是那隻三秒搶走我冰淇淋的海鷗。
海邊教我的事：野心夠大、動作夠快，就算只有翅膀也能贏。

en.content:
The happiest thing at the beach
wasn't me.
It was the seagull
that stole half my fries.

Its goal completion rate that day
beat my entire Q2.
en.editorNote: For the beach-fries-disaster photo, the seagull-in-mid-air action shot, or any Threads vent comparing your KPIs to a wild bird — pairs office burnout with beach chaos in a way every salaryman gets
variations: The most efficient coworker I've ever had was the seagull that took my ice cream in under three seconds.
The beach taught me: ambition plus speed beats degrees, even if you only have wings.

items.sourceNote: 外站票 / hack 旅遊 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
別人出國是去度假，
我出國是去執行
一個橫跨三個城市、
兩種匯率、
四段轉機
的省錢 SOP。
zh-tw.editorNote: 2026 機票漲價後外站票攻略爆紅的 timely 廢文——適合機場轉機自拍、Threads 炫耀省到錢的長文、PTT 自助旅行版心得開頭，把摳門寫成戰略
variations: 我不是會玩，我只是會算。
別人收集護照章，我收集刷卡回饋跟里程兌換券。

en.content:
Other people take vacations.
I execute
a three-city, two-currency,
four-layover
cost-optimization protocol.
en.editorNote: For the airport-transit selfie, the 'how I saved $400' Threads thread, or the budget-travel blog intro — reframes cheapness as strategy, which it absolutely is
variations: I'm not adventurous. I'm just good at math.
Other people collect passport stamps. I collect credit card points and award seats.

items.sourceNote: 「if found, return me to vacation」 frame，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
若您撿到我，
請勿交還公司，
請寄回沖繩任何一間
有海景、
有冷氣、
有冰啤酒的飯店。

謝謝。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合收假回公司第一天的 IG 限動、Threads 對著電腦發呆的廢文、跟同事互相取暖的 LINE 哀號——失物招領 frame 自帶結構感，比直接喊「不想上班」 有梗
variations: 如有拾獲，請聯絡墾丁某沙灘的躺椅，那是我真正的戶籍地。
我的肉體在辦公室，靈魂在上週的那座島，請勿合併。

en.content:
If found,
please do not return me to my employer.
Mail me back
to any hotel in Okinawa
with an ocean view,
working AC,
and cold beer.

Thank you.
en.editorNote: For the back-at-the-desk Monday selfie, the staring-at-Slack Threads post, or the office-chat solidarity message — the lost-and-found format gives the joke a structure that 'I hate Mondays' doesn't
variations: If recovered, please return me to a specific beach chair in Kenting. That's my legal address.
My body is at the office. My soul is on the island we left last week. Please don't try to reunite them.

items.sourceNote: 夏天高溫 / 防曬 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
夏天出去玩的真相是：
你不是在追日落，
你是在追一塊有冷氣的陰影，
順便拍張看起來很自由的照片。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合夏天海邊曬到融化的 IG 限動、Threads 出遊廢文、躲在便利商店吹冷氣的自拍——把暑假旅行的高溫真相寫到位，比「享受陽光」 誠實一百倍
variations: 我防曬乳擦的量，比我這趟拍的照片還多。
夏天旅行最遠的距離，是太陽底下的我跟最近一台冷氣之間。

en.content:
The truth about summer trips:
you're not chasing the sunset.
You're chasing the nearest patch of shade with AC,
and taking one photo that makes it look like freedom.
en.editorNote: For the melting-at-the-beach selfie, the hiding-in-a-convenience-store-for-the-AC photo, or any sweaty summer Threads post — the honest version of 'soaking up the sun'
variations: I used more sunscreen than the number of photos I actually took.
The longest distance in summer travel is between me in the sun and the closest air conditioner.

items.sourceNote: 拍照拍到食物冷掉 register，原創

zh-tw.content:
這趟旅行我學到一件事：
為了拍一張熱騰騰的食物照，
你必須先讓它徹底冷掉。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合食物擺拍後的 IG 食記、Threads 美食廢文、跟旅伴互相吐槽拍照習慣的對比文——把美食控的矛盾日常寫成一句金句
variations: 我吃過最冷的一餐，是我拍得最美的那一餐。
別人說趁熱吃，我說趁光線好先拍。

en.content:
Here's what this trip taught me:
to take one photo of steaming hot food,
you first have to let it go completely cold.
en.editorNote: For the food flat lay, the restaurant Threads post, or the buddy-roast caption about photo habits — the universal contradiction of the food traveler in one line
variations: The coldest meal I've ever eaten was also the most photogenic.
Everyone says eat it while it's hot. I say shoot it while the light's good.

items.sourceNote: 行程規劃強迫症 / over-planning register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我說好旅行是要放鬆的，
結果我做了一份
分鐘級的行程表、
三個備案餐廳、
還有一份雨天替代方案。

我不是在度假，
我是在執行專案。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合行程表截圖、Google 地圖標滿大頭針的截圖、Threads 規劃控自嘲文——精準描述把度假做成專案的那種人，自帶笑點又真實
variations: 我的旅行行程表比我老闆給的工作排程還細。
別人旅行是隨遇而安，我旅行是甘特圖。

en.content:
I told myself this trip was about relaxing.
Then I built
a minute-by-minute itinerary,
three backup restaurants,
and a rainy-day contingency plan.

I'm not on vacation.
I'm running a project.
en.editorNote: For the color-coded itinerary screenshot, the map-covered-in-pins shot, or the over-planner Threads confession — nails the person who turns a holiday into a deliverable
variations: My travel itinerary has more detail than the schedule my boss gives me.
Other people travel by going with the flow. I travel by Gantt chart.

items.sourceNote: 收假前夜 / Sunday scaries register，原創

zh-tw.content:
假期最殘忍的不是結束，
是結束前一晚，
你躺在自己床上，
身體還記得海的味道，
腦袋已經開始排明天的會。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合收假前一晚的 Threads 哀號、回國第一個週日的 IG 限動、跟同事互相取暖的 LINE——把假期尾聲那種身心分裂寫得很有畫面感
variations: 收假前夜的失眠，跟出國前夜的失眠是同一種，只是方向相反。
我人已經回家了，靈魂還卡在登機門。

en.content:
The cruelest part of a vacation isn't the ending.
It's the night before it ends,
lying in your own bed,
your body still remembering the ocean
while your brain starts scheduling tomorrow's meetings.
en.editorNote: For the Sunday-night-before-work Threads post, the first-night-home IG story, or the office-chat solidarity message — captures the body-and-mind split at the tail end of a trip
variations: The insomnia the night before a trip ends is the same as the night before it starts. Just pointed the other way.
My body made it home. My soul is still stuck at the boarding gate.

items.sourceNote: airplane mode / digital detox register，原創

zh-tw.content:
起飛前我把手機調成飛航模式，
才發現
那個沒人找得到我的人，
才是我這趟旅行真正想成為的樣子。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合登機前關機的 IG 限動、Threads 數位排毒短發、飛機窗景照——把「飛航模式」 從一個按鍵升格成一種狀態，自帶療癒感
variations: 飛航模式的真正用途，是讓你有藉口暫時不回任何人。
我不是收訊不好，我是終於選擇收訊不好。

en.content:
I switched my phone to airplane mode before takeoff
and realized
that the person nobody can reach
is exactly who I came on this trip to be.
en.editorNote: For the pre-takeoff phone shot, the digital-detox Threads post, or the window-seat selfie — turns 'airplane mode' from a button into a whole mood
variations: Airplane mode is just a socially acceptable excuse to ignore everyone for a while.
I don't have bad signal. I finally chose bad signal.

items.sourceNote: camera roll storage full register，原創

zh-tw.content:
我手機相簿的儲存空間滿了，
但我一張都捨不得刪。

因為每一張模糊的、手震的、拍歪的，
都是那一秒我真的在那裡的證據。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合相簿快爆的截圖、回國整理照片的 Threads 短發、IG 旅行回顧——把「存空間不足」 寫成一種捨不得，比單純抱怨手機有溫度
variations: 我不是不會整理照片，我是捨不得讓那幾天從記憶卡裡消失。
別人的相簿是精選，我的相簿是現場直播。

en.content:
My phone says storage is full,
but I can't bring myself to delete a single one.

Every blurry, shaky, crooked shot
is proof that for one second, I was actually there.
en.editorNote: For the 'storage full' screenshot, the post-trip photo-cleanup Threads post, or the travel recap carousel — reframes a full camera roll as something tender instead of an annoyance
variations: It's not that I can't organize my photos. I just can't let those days disappear off the memory card.
Other people's albums are a highlight reel. Mine is a live broadcast.

items.sourceNote: running to the gate / cardio register，原創改寫

zh-tw.content:
我這個人平常完全不運動，
唯一會全力衝刺的時刻，
是廣播喊出我的名字、
登機門即將關閉的那一刻。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合趕飛機後氣喘吁吁的自拍、Threads 出國糗事短發、跟旅伴互嘲遲到的對比文——把「最後一刻衝登機門」 的狼狽寫成段子
variations: 我的有氧運動，就是聽到「最後登機通知」 四個字。
登機門前的衝刺，是我一年唯一一次心率破表。

en.content:
I never work out.
The only time I sprint at full speed
is when they call my name over the speakers
and the gate is about to close.
en.editorNote: For the out-of-breath post-sprint selfie, the 'almost missed my flight' Threads post, or the buddy-roast caption about being late — turns the gate-dash panic into a punchline
variations: My cardio routine is hearing the words 'final boarding call.'
The dash to the gate is the only time all year my heart rate maxes out.

items.sourceNote: bad wifi / paradise register，重新改寫

zh-tw.content:
我夢想中的天堂，
有海、有陽光、有一杯冰的，
唯一的缺點是，
那裡的 Wi-Fi 爛到
剛好沒人找得到我。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合海邊度假照、飯店泳池畔自拍、Threads 放空短發——把「網路爛」 從缺點翻轉成優點，自帶慵懶度假感
variations: 這裡網路超慢，但我的心跳也是，剛好。
天堂的定義，是訊號剛好爛到讓你有理由不上班。

en.content:
My idea of paradise
has an ocean, some sun, and something cold to drink.
Its only flaw
is that the Wi-Fi is bad enough
that nobody can find me.
en.editorNote: For the beachside vacation shot, the poolside selfie, or the 'doing absolutely nothing' Threads post — flips bad signal from a complaint into the whole point
variations: The Wi-Fi here is slow, and so is my heart rate. Perfect.
Paradise is just a place with signal bad enough to justify not working.
